About.about-main-text: Shovly Travel is an inbound and outbound tour operator based in Turkmenistan, offering cooperation in group, individual, and family tourism. Founded in 2019 by a team of professional tour guides with over 10 years of field experience, our main office is located in Ashgabat, the capital of Turkmenistan.
About.up-text: An eye for the out of the ordinary
About.up-title: More Than a Destination — A Deeper Journey
About.down-text: We offer mutual cooperation and a wide range of reception and hospitality services throughout Turkmenistan. Our services include hotel reservations, airport and city transfers, guided excursions, and museum tickets. We accommodate and host bus groups across all cities and regions of Turkmenistan according to your budget. We offer classic tours, UNESCO tours, and completely custom itineraries built around your wishes. Whether you're looking for a relaxing cultural journey, an adventurous road trip, or a tailored family experience, our experienced team handles every detail.
About.title: Your Trusted Travel Partner in Turkmenistan
About.text: Shovly Travel provides reliable, personalized travel solutions designed around your needs. With over five years of experience and a deep knowledge of Turkmenistan, we guide you every step of the way — from planning to unforgettable experiences across ancient Silk Road cities, stunning desert landscapes, and the white marble capital of Ashgabat.
About.hero-subtitle: Where Every Journey Tells a Story
About.value1-text: We showcase the real Turkmenistan, connecting you with local culture, history, and hidden gems far beyond typical tourist paths.
About.value2-text: Every traveler is unique. We tailor each journey to your preferences, pace, and interests for truly memorable adventures.
About.value3-text: Founded by professional guides with 10+ years of expertise, we deliver flawless service, transparent pricing, and unwavering commitment to your satisfaction.
About.gallery-subtitle: A glimpse into the ancient beauty and modern charm of our homeland
About.cta-title: Ready to Explore the Heart of Central Asia?
About.cta-text: Let us craft an unforgettable journey tailored just for you. From the Silk Road cities to the Karakum Desert — your adventure awaits.
About.feature1-text: Official tour operator with full certification

Gallery.gallery-text: Explore our gallery and get a glimpse of the unforgettable experiences we offer. From stunning landscapes to cultural adventures, see the journeys that await you and imagine yourself in the heart of every destination.

Tour.main-text: Your next adventure awaits! Browse our exclusive tours and find the perfect getaway tailored just for you.
Tour.banner-subtitle: Explore handcrafted journeys through ancient Silk Road cities, pristine desert landscapes, and cultural treasures

Blog.banner-subtitle: Authentic stories, insider tips, and cultural insights from the heart of Central Asia

Services.title: Our Services
Services.text: We provide comprehensive travel services to make your journey to Turkmenistan seamless and memorable
Services.flight-text: Multiple airlines connect Turkmenistan to the world. We help you find and book the best option for your journey.
Services.flight-main-text: Ashgabat International Airport is the main international gateway to Turkmenistan. Several airlines operate regular services connecting the country to destinations across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
Services.hotel-text: Choose from a wide range of hotels in Ashgabat and other cities. From luxury to budget-friendly options.
Services.hotel-main-text: Discover a world of comfort, style, and unforgettable experiences with our carefully selected hotels around the globe. From luxury resorts and boutique hotels to family-friendly stays and budget-smart options, we help you find the perfect accommodation for every type of trip.
Services.visa-text: Hassle-free visa assistance for Turkmenistan. We provide the Letter of Invitation (LOI) and guide you through every step.
Services.visa-main-text: Obtaining a Turkmenistan visa does not have to be complicated. Below you will find a clear step-by-step guide.
Services.visa-step1-text: Reach out to us at least 4–8 weeks before your intended arrival in Turkmenistan. We will discuss and finalise your day-by-day travel itinerary, modes of transport, and accommodation.
Services.visa-step2-text: Send us the following documents by email: (1) Colour scan of your passport photo page including barcode — clearly readable, no glare; (2) Colour scan of a recent passport photo (original must be 3×4 cm); (3) Full name; (4) Any previous names (e.g. before marriage); (5) Current citizenship; (6) Marital status; (7) Full name, date of birth and citizenship of spouse (if applicable); (8) Full name(s), date(s) of birth and citizenship of children (if applicable); (9) Full home address of permanent residence; (10) Email address; (11) Job title / current occupation; (12) Employer name and address; (13) Previous visits to Turkmenistan (year, month, purpose).
Services.visa-step3-title: Step 3 — We Apply for Your LOI
Services.visa-step3-text: Once we receive all documents in the correct format, our team submits the Letter of Invitation (LOI) application to the Turkmenistan state visa authority. Processing takes 5–15 working days. We cannot influence or predict the outcome, but we will notify you immediately once the result is issued.
Services.visa-step4-title: Step 4 — Receive Your LOI by Email
Services.visa-step4-text: We will send you a scanned copy of the approved LOI by email. Print it out — you do not need to wait for a physical copy in the post. Entry Travel Pass and country registration are automatically included when you book a tour or all transport and accommodation through us.
Services.visa-step5-text: With your printed LOI in hand, you can collect your Turkmenistan Tourist Visa at: a Turkmenistan Embassy or consulate abroad; Ashgabat International Airport on arrival; or a Turkmen land border that provides visa-on-arrival services. Note: Turkmenistan does not issue group tourist visas — each traveller needs an individual visa and a passport valid for at least 6 months on arrival.
Services.visa-loi-text: A Letter of Invitation (LOI) is an official approval document required for all leisure visitors to Turkmenistan. Shovly Travel is a licensed agency authorised to apply for LOIs on behalf of our clients. The LOI is the basis on which your tourist visa is issued.
Services.visa-embassies-text: Turkmen embassies can be found in: Armenia, Afghanistan, Azerbaijan, Austria, Belgium, Belarus, Germany, Georgia, France, China, India, Iran, Italy, Japan, Kazakhstan, South Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Malaysia, Pakistan, Romania, Russia, Saudi Arabia, Switzerland, UAE, UK, Ukraine, USA, Uzbekistan, Tajikistan, and Turkey. Always check the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Turkmenistan website for the most current information, and contact the embassy before visiting as visa costs and procedures may differ.
Services.visa-transit-note: Transit visas are issued only directly at Turkmen embassies abroad. Please contact the relevant embassy for prices and procedures.
Services.visa-tip-text: You do not need to be at home to receive your LOI — we send it digitally. All you need is internet access and a printer at any point before you reach the Turkmen border.
Services.flight-tm-airlines-text: The national airline operates regular flights from Ashgabat to: Frankfurt, Moscow, St. Petersburg, Kazan, London, Istanbul, Milan, Kuala Lumpur, Ho Chi Minh City, Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Delhi, Beijing, and Bangkok. The fleet consists entirely of Boeing aircraft.
Services.flight-other-airlines-text: In addition to the national carrier, the following airlines serve Turkmenistan: Turkish Airlines, flydubai, S7 Airlines, and Belavia (Belarusian Airlines).
Services.flight-tip-text: Shovly Travel can assist with flight bookings to and within Turkmenistan. We work with all operating carriers to find you the most convenient schedule and competitive fares. Contact us for a personalised flight quote.

Footer.text: Leave your mark in a country where every stone is a story, every dune an adventure, every day a discovery.

Tours.tours-text: Discover carefully curated journeys to the most picturesque corners of the world. Ancient cities, natural wonders, and unique cultural itineraries—each tour is designed to provide you with an unforgettable experience, accompanied by experienced guides.
Tours.tours-price_clarify: The final price depends on your selected hotel category and any additional services or upgrades. Please contact our office for a personalized quote.

Contacts.text: We are here to help! If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to reach out to us.
